spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1175 The Yggdrasil Structure in Elbaf - Shanks Swords True Power Oda is clearly drawing from Norse mythology, specifically the world tree Yggdrasil. In mythology, three key beings occupy the
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1175 The Yggdrasil Structure in Elbaf - Shanks Swords True Power Oda is clearly drawing from Norse mythology, specifically the world tree Yggdrasil. In mythology, three key beings occupy the tree: Nidhogg – At the roots (Underworld) Ratatoskr – The messenger along the trunk Hræsvelgr – The giant eagle at the top (Heaven) Now in Elbaf we seemingly have: Underworld → Loki with Nidhogg powers Sun World → Ratatoskr’s soul in Ragnir Heaven World → ??? (missing piece) Two of the three mythological beings are already present in some form. Which makes the absence of Hræsvelgr… suspicious.

spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1175 .... Imagine if Zunisha eats it... 💀💀💀💀 Panini (@writingpanini) #OnePiece #OnePiece1175 #opspoilers The size of Nidhogg is proportional to the size of whoever eats it. — https://nitt
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1175 .... Imagine if Zunisha eats it... 💀💀💀💀 Panini (@writingpanini) #OnePiece #OnePiece1175 #opspoilers The size of Nidhogg is proportional to the size of whoever eats it. — https://nitter.net/writingpanini/status/2026382323147559395#m

spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1175 BRIEF SPOILERS FOR ONEPIECE CHAPTER 1175 BY ME
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1175 BRIEF SPOILERS FOR ONEPIECE CHAPTER 1175 BY ME

misc.title: The Sword Theory – Gryphon as Hræsvelgr Shanks’ sword is named Gryphon. A gryphon is: - Half eagle - Royal guardian creature - Symbol of sovereignty That is already eagle symbolism. Now consider: - Sh
misc.text: The Sword Theory – Gryphon as Hræsvelgr Shanks’ sword is named Gryphon. A gryphon is: - Half eagle - Royal guardian creature - Symbol of sovereignty That is already eagle symbolism. Now consider: - Shamrock wields a weapon tied to Cerberus. - Ratatoskr’s soul inhabits Ragnir. - Zoans have wills. Objects can possess powers. It becomes very plausible that: Gryphon is not just a sword. It could be: A Mythical Zoan weapon – Model: Hræsvelgr OR A weapon housing the soul of Hræsvelgr. That would parallel Ratatoskr perfectly. If Nidhogg = Lightning destruction If Ratatoskr = Ice guardian Then Hræsvelgr logically controls: - Wind - Storm currents - Atmospheric pressure Weather manipulation That could be Shank's sword power, rivaling Nidhogg lightning or Ratatoskr Ice powers...

misc.title: The Loki vs Shanks Parallel(And Shanks role connected to Hraesvelgr). If Loki = Nidhogg (roots, chaos, lightning) And Shanks wields Hræsvelgr (sky, wind, heaven) Then their clash becomes myth reenactm
misc.text: The Loki vs Shanks Parallel(And Shanks role connected to Hraesvelgr). If Loki = Nidhogg (roots, chaos, lightning) And Shanks wields Hræsvelgr (sky, wind, heaven) Then their clash becomes myth reenactment: Dragon of the roots vs Eagle of the heavens And what happened? Shanks didn’t kill Loki. He subdued him. In mythology, Hræsvelgr doesn’t descend to destroy Nidhogg. He remains above. We don´t know what happend between Loki and Shanks but the fact how much the giants respect Shanks, how Loki was stopped in the end, make it possible that Shanks represent Hraesvelgr, rivalling Loki powers. It make sense given for what Shanks also stand: - He intervenes only when balance collapses. - He has access to the highest authorities. - He is respected by giants. He stands above chaos rather than indulging in it. Hræsvelgr represents: The power at the top of the world tree. Shanks acts exactly like that in the world balance. He literally fits well to it, im pretty sure his sword has Hræsvelgr as power source. And it would be a huge power given Shanks haki is itself pretty broken. It could also explain how WIfi worked out, via wind manipulation+haki... I think Shanks generally possesses the power of Hræsvelgr within his sword. In short, it would also fit very well with Shanks' character and his importance to Elbaph and especially One Piece. We got Nidhogg and Ratatoskr, so the chance of a Hræsvelgr Zoan power is 99% certain in my opinion. And no one fits Hræsvelgr better than Shanks. What do you think of this theory?

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 Nidhogg is said to be able to use breath lightning attacks, using lightning power in general. The fact Ratatoskr is called a ice squirrel means he most likely pose ice powers. I combinat
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 Nidhogg is said to be able to use breath lightning attacks, using lightning power in general. The fact Ratatoskr is called a ice squirrel means he most likely pose ice powers. I combination of both, Loki is able to use both Lightning and Ice powers...
